message:
fix: init guard allows fresh clones with committed metadata.json (GH#2433, GH#2441)

When metadata.json exists (tracked by git) but dolt/ directory is absent
(gitignored) and no server is running, recognize this as a fresh clone and
allow init to proceed for bootstrapping (e.g. via --from-jsonl).

Co-Authored-By: marcodelpin <marcodelpin@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
